items.title: Interpol operation seized 45,000 malicious IPs and servers tied to phishing
items.summary: Operation Synergia III disrupted phishing, malware, and ransomware infrastructure across 72 countries, with 94 arrests and 110 suspects under investigation.

items.title: IC3 alert: officials impersonated in malicious messaging campaign
items.summary: Alert warns of impersonation scams targeting permit applicants with urgent payment demands and urges independent verification.

items.title: FBI PSA: senior U.S. officials impersonated in smishing/vishing campaign
items.summary: Malicious actors used SMS and AI‑generated voice messages to impersonate officials and attempt credential or account access.
